examples: The motion can not is put, because the proposer can not find a seconder for it.
In addition to the main question, there are various seconder matters to talk about.
Any Tory MP can throw his or her hat into the leadership ring, requiring just a proposer and seconder.
They must also find the backing of at least two members of the Liberal Democrat parliamentary party - one proposer, and one seconder.
Treasury spokesman Malcolm Bruce has the backing of three, while Simon Hughes, Don Foster, David Rendel and Jackie Ballard have just two MPs each to act as proposer and seconder.
